@sepo-agent /implement

Plant the idea below as a seedling note. Definition of done: a new note
under `content/ideas/` with `status: seedling`, linked from a topic map or
related note (no orphans), listed in `content/ideas/_meta.json`, and
`npm run check:site` passes.
